g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does NGINX forward requests to Pingora?')
sendPrompt('What does NGINX do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What headers does the business service receive?')
sendPrompt('How does token extraction work for cookies vs Bearer headers?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between JWKS and introspection strategies?')
sendPrompt('How does role-based access control work in Pingora?')
sendPrompt('How does OAuth2 scope enforcement work?')
sendPrompt('What headers does Pingora inject into the upstream request?')
g.text: inject x-user-id · x-user-roles · x-user-scopes · traceparent · strip JWT + cookie

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the JWKS background refresh work?')
sendPrompt('What does the BFF browser redirect flow look like?')
g.text: 302 → IdP if Accept: text/html + no token
